CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Kwdz Manufacturing, Llc
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Kwdz Manufacturing, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Counsel for Mr. Moore is required to prepare and submit a proposed order and a proposed consent judgment signed by all parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

**ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED AFTER HEARING.**

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Plaintiff John Moore Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Kwdz Manufacturing, Llc
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court vacates the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff John Moore's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Kwdz Manufacturing, Llc is off calendar per request of the moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

Plaintiff John Moore Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Kwdz Manufacturing, Llc
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Continued To Nov-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher F. Tuttle of the law offices of The Chanler Group (510-848-8880) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation and order appointing temporary judge is signed and filed.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff John Moore'S Motion To Compel Responses To special Interrogatories and Requests for Production From KWDZ Manufacturing, LLC is CONTINUED to November 28, 2017 at 9:00 AM in Department 302/Discovery to be heard by Judge Pro Tem Steven B. Stein. Plaintiff counsel reports that this action has settled in principle in its entirety, pending the filing of notice of settlement, to be filed by plaintiff. Upon filing of Notice of Settlement, the plaintiff shall email a copy directly to judge pro tem Steven B. Stein to sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Kwdz Manufacturing, Llc

No appearances.

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Kwdz Manufacturing, Llc is Continued to 10/31/17 at 9:00 AM in Department 302/Discovery.
